---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for Ghostboard
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and short description of the feature.

## Problem

What problem does this solve?
What feels awkward, limited, or missing today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the idea as clearly as you can.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about?

## Scope

- [ ] small improvement
- [ ] new user-facing feature
- [ ] architecture / infrastructure
- [ ] developer experience
- [ ] documentation

## Additional context

Mockups, references, screenshots, examples, or implementation notes.
